case_title: CCSF - OFFICE OF TREASURER/ TAX COLLECTOR VS. SEAN RIETH

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CCSF - OFFICE OF TREASURER/ TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT RIETH, SEAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-03-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF - OFFICE OF TREASURER/ TAX COLLECTOR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-03-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-03-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JUMA BYRD--SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-03-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF - OFFICE OF TREASURER/ TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RIETH, SEAN $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,045.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
